scripts.contracts:generate: pnpm prepare:quant && services/quant/.venv/bin/python services/quant/scripts/export_openapi.py && pnpm --dir packages/contracts generate
scripts.dev: pnpm prepare:quant && pnpm --dir apps/desktop tauri dev
scripts.build: pnpm prepare:quant && pnpm --dir apps/desktop tauri build
scripts.check: pnpm prepare:quant && pnpm check:quant && pnpm check:desktop
scripts.check:quant: services/quant/.venv/bin/ruff check services/quant/src services/quant/tests services/quant/scripts && services/quant/.venv/bin/ruff format --check services/quant/src services/quant/tests services/quant/scripts && services/quant/.venv/bin/pytest
scripts.test: pnpm prepare:quant && services/quant/.venv/bin/pytest && pnpm --dir apps/desktop test
